macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: Energy Prices Surge Amid Ongoing War with Iran
items.summary: Energy prices continue to rise sharply due to the war with Iran, with gas prices topping $4 per gallon for the first time since 2022 and companies imposing fuel surcharges on shipping and airlines. The crisis marks the biggest oil supply shock in history, losing 11 million barrels per day.

items.title: Companies Adopt Fuel Surcharges Due to Iran War
items.summary: The war with Iran is driving up shipping and airline costs, leading companies to add fees and surcharges amid escalating energy prices.

items.title: Biggest Oil Supply Shock Hits One-Month Mark
items.summary: The Iran crisis has caused a loss of 11 million barrels/day of oil, exceeding past shocks, with second-order impacts on food, semiconductors, petrochemicals, and global shipping including trapped vessels.

items.title: Oil Storms Higher on Iran War Escalation
items.summary: Oil prices surged as Iran targeted more sites in Arab Gulf states overnight into Friday, following US actions, intensifying the global energy crisis.

items.title: IEA Warns of Severe Oil Crisis and Emergency Needs
items.summary: IEA head Fatih Birol described the Iran situation as very severe, with impacts disrupting factories in India and global supply chains for fertilizers, helium, and petrochemicals.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: SIREN Token Surges 112% in 24 Hours to $0.548
items.summary: SIREN token experienced a massive 111.66% price increase over the past 24 hours, reaching $0.548 with a $398 million market cap, ranking it as the 108th largest cryptocurrency. On-chain data highlights strong momentum amid a relatively stable broader market.

items.title: Bitcoin Trades Sideways Around $66,800 with Declining Futures Open Interest
items.summary: Bitcoin is trading at approximately $66,810, with futures open interest dropping across major exchanges like CME and Binance, and put options outpacing calls 54.87% to 45.13% on Deribit, indicating defensive trader positioning.

items.title: BNB Flips XRP in Market Cap Rankings Again
items.summary: BNB has surpassed XRP in market capitalization once more, while Bitcoin slips below $67,000; other notable movers include HASH gaining value and M and FET declining sharply in the past 24 hours.

items.title: Bitcoin Records Worst Q1 Performance Since 2018 with 23.8% Decline
items.summary: Bitcoin lost 23.8% in Q1 2026, its worst first-quarter drop since 2018, entering April at around $66,500; historical patterns suggest potential recovery in April.

items.title: Kalshi Suspends Nevada Operations Amid Regulatory Injunction
items.summary: Prediction market platform Kalshi paused operations in Nevada following a court extension of a temporary regulatory injunction, amid ongoing legal battles in multiple US states.

items.title: Massive 14.7 Million Chainlink (LINK) Inflow to Binance
items.summary: A record 14.7 million LINK tokens flooded into Binance, the largest inflow of the year, potentially signaling volatility in thin markets.

items.title: Ethereum Net Taker Volume Hits Most Positive Level Since 2023
items.summary: Ethereum's net taker volume has risen to its highest positive level since the 2023 bull market, despite price hovering around $2,000 with no clear recovery path yet.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Microsoft Releases New AI Models: MAI-Transcribe-1, MAI-Voice-1, and MAI-Image-2
items.summary: Microsoft launched three state-of-the-art AI models for transcription, audio processing, and image generation, signaling its intent to build its own AI capabilities independently of partners like OpenAI.

items.title: OpenAI Closes Massive $122 Billion Funding Round at $852 Billion Valuation
items.summary: OpenAI secured a $122 billion funding round backed by Amazon, NVIDIA, SoftBank, and Microsoft to scale compute infrastructure, expand API and Codex platforms, and develop a unified AI superapp.

items.title: Z.ai Open-Sources GLM-5V Turbo with Multimodal Coding Capabilities
items.summary: Z.ai released GLM-5V Turbo, an open-source model optimized for multimodal coding and Claw scenarios, enhancing accessibility for developers.

items.title: Meta's TRIBE v2: Tri-Modal Brain Encoder Predicts fMRI Responses
items.summary: Meta FAIR introduced TRIBE v2, a foundation model trained on over 1,000 hours of fMRI data to predict brain activity from video, audio, and language stimuli, outperforming traditional models.

items.title: Anthropic Restricts OpenClaw Access for Claude Subscribers Amid Cost Concerns
items.summary: Anthropic announced that Claude Code subscribers must pay extra for OpenClaw usage and cut off access in a cost crackdown, as revealed in recent updates.

items.title: India's Sarvam AI Nears $300-350M Raise at $1.5B Valuation
items.summary: Sarvam AI is close to securing $300-350 million in funding led by Bessemer Venture Partners, with NVIDIA, Amazon, and others, to advance voice-first, multilingual models for 22 Indian languages.

items.title: Lund University AI Model Detects Multiple Brain Diseases from Single Blood Sample
items.summary: Researchers developed an AI model using proteomics data from over 17,000 participants to diagnose Alzheimer's, Parkinson's, ALS, frontotemporal dementia, and stroke, outperforming prior models.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.
